scenarios.rubric: Contiguous repeat layout, correct output shape, no aliasing/mutation of input.
Compiles; &self interior mutability; LRU eviction correct; O(1) structure; Send+Sync usable across threads.
Header handled, ints summed per (region,product), blank lines skipped, correct nested dict on known input.
Hand-rolled LCS; valid diff (reconstruction invariant holds for both a and b); correct prefixes; no difflib.
